notebooks.title: Notebooks
notebooks.openJupyterLabTitle: Open the full JupyterLab (same env and files) in your browser
notebooks.description: All Jupyter notebooks across your session folders, newest first. Cells run on the local Python or R kernel in the notebook's own folder; the agent works on the same files.

empty.tauri: No notebooks yet. Create one, or ask the agent to produce one.
empty.web: Notebooks are available in the desktop app.

toast.setUpJupyterFirst: Set up Jupyter first — Settings → MCP servers → Jupyter.

editor.shortcutHint: Shift/⌘+Enter runs a cell · shared with the agent
editor.historyTitle: History — every recorded version with its code and conversation
editor.stopCellTitle: Stop — restarts this notebook's kernel (variables reset)

files.explorerUnavailableWeb: The file explorer is available in the desktop app.
files.selectFilePrompt: Select a file to preview it here.

skills.title: Skills & Agents

description.prefix: Loaded live from the OpenCode runtime — the bundled ai4s-skills pack plus anything under

install.placeholder: Paste a skill (Markdown) or a GitHub URL — the agent installs it into .opencode/skills/
install.hintConnected: Opens a session and asks the agent to add it (customize-opencode).

environment.detectionUnavailable: Environment detection runs in the desktop app.
environment.note: OpenCode runs code with whatever is installed here (e.g. Python via its shell tool). Python/R/Jupyter are not bundled; install them or a Science Pack to enable analysis.

skills.disconnected: Connect the runtime to list the skills and agents it has loaded.
